title: trichocline ovalis
intro: Trichocline ovalis, also known as the 'lemon scented button daisy', is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. It is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Trichocline ovalis include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
